title: Night Beast (disambiguation)
content:
'''Night Beast''' can refer to one of the following characters:

*"'''[[Night Beast/Canon|Night Beast]]'''," the callsign of a [[TIE pilot]] who flew a [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter]] as part of the [[Imperial Navy]]'s [[Obsidian Squadron]].
*"'''Night Beast'''," the callsign of '''[[Dodson Makraven/Legends|Dodson Makraven]]''', an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] that flew [[TIE/LN starfighter]]s with [[Obsidian Squadron/Legends|Obsidian Squadron]].
*'''Night Beast''', the name given to '''[[Kalgrath]]''', the last [[Massassi/Legends|Massassi]] warrior, after his transformation and emergence from stasis on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]].

==See also==
